---
title: "Welcome to Corey S. Sparks's Blog"
description: |
  Welcome to my new blog. Here I will regularly post examples from my courses, and other content in the areas of demography, statistics and data science. I hope you enjoy 
  reading what I have to say, and please contact me with any questions or feedback! - Regularly contributing to [R-Bloggers](https://www.r-bloggers.com)
author:
  - name: Corey S. Sparks
    url: https://github.com/coreysparks
    affiliation: University of Texas at San Antonio
    affiliation_url: https://hcap.utsa.edu/directory/corey-sparks-ph-d/
date: 04-07-2021
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---


### This blog will regularly contribute to the [R-Bloggers Feed](https://www.r-bloggers.com/)
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating blogs with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/blog.html

```
